subcodes.first_line: O Forgiver! The servant at the threshold took refuge with Jamshid, was among the righteous ones, and yearned for attainment unto Thy presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آمرزگار بنده درگاه جمشید پناه باستان برد و از راستان بود مشتاق دیدار بود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @eulogies; reminiscences
